title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, and structured output.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with multi-model conversations, file uploads, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: generate, chat, embed, and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Experimental Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with convenient commands and progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nuxt-chat
summary: Nuxt 3 full-stack starter that wires Ollama chat completions into a reactive UI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented Generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Bolt-js Slack bot that integrates Ollama completions into channels and DMs.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama and run model tests.

title: ollama-cpp (unofficial bindings)
summary: Experimental C++ wrapper around Ollama’s REST API for native desktop apps.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component that adds a chat interface widget backed by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes and insert completions.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example that scales Ollama models across a Ray cluster.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as Generators or Embedders in pipelines.
